channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Nancy Mace Weighs Senate Bid After Graham's Sudden Death
item.description: Rep. Nancy Mace, R-S.C., is "strongly considering" a run for the Senate seat left vacant by Sen. Lindsey Graham's death, Axios reported, as South Caro...

item.title: Watch: Trump Weighs in on Lindsey Graham's 'Finest Moment' - Highlights on Kavanaugh
What Happens Now? The Race to Fill Graham's Seat Has Already Begun
Platner aide hit with brutal timeline check after campaign denied rape claim, then folded days later
item.description: Graham Platner suspended his Maine Senate campaign on Wednesday, after Jenny Racicot alleged he raped her.
